title: Cariston Diedericks joins Badgers Women
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - SWD Cricket has announced...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - SWD Cricket has announced the appointment of Cariston Diedericks as strength and conditioning coach of the Garden Route Badgers professional women’s team.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - SWD Cricket has announced the appointment of Cariston Diedericks as strength and conditioning coach of the Garden Route Badgers professional women’s team."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Diedericks who holds a National Diploma in strength and conditioning training and a Cricket South Africa Level II coaching certificate represented the Border Academy cricket and youth teams as a player."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He spent five seasons as head of performance at the Chippa United professional football team that plays in the premier soccer league in South Africa.","html":"He spent five seasons as head of performance at the Chippa United professional football team that plays in the premier soccer league in South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Diedericks will join the head coach of the team, Wynand de Ridder and assistant coach, Yolandi van der Westhuizen.","html":"Diedericks will join the head coach of the team, Wynand de Ridder and assistant coach, Yolandi van der Westhuizen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
